features.name: Phase 0 - Stabilize Harness And Baseline
features.description: Keep the coding harness reliable and keep state files aligned with the Zalo Gateway + Hermes plugin architecture.
doneCriteria: Harness validator score remains at least 85/100.
npm test passes after harness updates.
npm run typecheck passes.
docs/GATEWAY_PLAN.md is present and referenced by harness state files.

verificationEvidence.notes: Typecheck passed and 20 test files / 155 tests passed after the SSE/plugin plan update.

features.evidence: Harness and gateway baseline are stable; plan now targets Zalo Gateway + Hermes Zalo Platform Plugin.

features.name: Phase 1 - Standalone Gateway Skeleton
features.description: Add a standalone HTTP server entrypoint and health/version routes without requiring OpenClaw runtime or real Zalo login in tests.
doneCriteria: Server can be instantiated in tests without real Zalo login.
GET /health returns service status and Zalo client connection state.
GET /version returns package/version/runtime info.
Auth helper and route shape have tests.

verificationEvidence.notes: Covered by current gateway test suite.

features.evidence: Gateway skeleton is implemented and passing tests.

features.name: Phase 2 - Zalo Client Boundary
features.description: Wrap zca-js login/session/listener/send behavior behind a gateway-owned interface so route code does not depend on OpenClaw runtime.
doneCriteria: Gateway route code depends only on GatewayZaloClient interface.
Unit tests use a mocked Zalo client.
Real zca-js credentials remain outside tests.

verificationEvidence.notes: Gateway client tests are part of the current 155-test suite.

features.name: Phase 3 - Messaging, Webhooks, And Policy MVP
features.description: Add authenticated POST /messages/send, normalized inbound webhook dispatch, and gateway-side allowlist policy.
doneCriteria: POST /messages/send requires bearer token.
Route validates required fields and returns stable JSON errors.
Inbound event shape is normalized and documented.
Webhook dispatcher handles success and failure paths in tests.
Gateway-side policy blocks unauthorized inbound and outbound traffic.

verificationEvidence.notes: Messaging, webhook, and policy tests pass in the current suite.

features.evidence: Messaging, webhooks, and policy are implemented.

features.name: Phase 4 - Curated Action Registry
features.description: Expose POST /actions/:action for a small stable subset of zaloclaw actions before expanding toward the full action surface.
doneCriteria: Action registry has a typed handler map.
Initial actions include send, reply-message, add-reaction, get-thread-info, get-group-members, list-friends, list-groups, mark-read, and wired media send actions.
Tests cover each initial action with mocked Zalo client.
Docs list supported actions and phased action coverage.

verificationEvidence.notes: Curated action tests pass in the current suite.

features.evidence: Curated action registry is implemented for the current action set.

features.name: Phase 5 - Legacy Hermes Webhook Bridge
features.description: Keep the existing webhook-to-Hermes-CLI bridge available as a fallback while the native Hermes platform plugin is built.
doneCriteria: A Zalo message can trigger Hermes through webhook or adapter in a documented smoke flow.
Hermes reply can be sent back through POST /messages/send.
No Hermes core files are modified.

verificationEvidence.notes: Hermes bridge tests pass in the current suite.

features.evidence: Legacy Hermes webhook bridge is implemented and should remain optional.

features.name: Phase 6 - Gateway SSE Event Stream
features.description: Add authenticated GET /events SSE so Hermes platform plugins and local agents can subscribe without exposing a webhook server, while preserving webhooks for n8n/custom consumers.
codebaseMemoryQueries: Inspect gateway onMessage webhook path before adding shared event hub
Find tests for streaming HTTP responses in this TypeScript/Vitest setup
doneCriteria: GET /events requires bearer auth and returns text/event-stream.
Allowed inbound Zalo events publish to both webhooks and SSE subscribers.
Unauthorized inbound events are blocked before webhook or SSE fan-out.
SSE emits message.created records and heartbeat records.
Tests cover stream auth and at least one live mocked delivery.

verificationEvidence.notes: Typecheck passed; full suite passed with 21 test files / 158 tests after adding SSE.

features.evidence: Authenticated GET /events SSE is implemented with shared inbound policy and webhook fan-out regression coverage.

features.name: Phase 7 - Hermes Zalo Platform Plugin
features.description: Add a Hermes platform plugin that subscribes to Zalo Gateway SSE and sends replies through the gateway HTTP API, replacing the CLI bridge as the preferred Hermes integration.
codebaseMemoryQueries: Inspect Hermes built-in platform adapters and ctx.register_platform signature before implementation
doneCriteria: Plugin registers platform zalo without modifying Hermes core.
Plugin consumes GET /events from the gateway.
Hermes replies are sent through POST /messages/send.
Plugin install/enable and mocked gateway event smoke flow are documented.
Legacy webhook bridge remains available but is documented as fallback.

verificationEvidence.notes: Typecheck passed; full suite passed with 22 test files / 162 tests after preserving media attachments in the Hermes plugin and adding send_voice for Hermes auto-TTS voice replies.

features.evidence: Initial plugin implemented in hermes-plugin/ with manifest, register(ctx), SSE subscriber, gateway HTTP sender, and static contract tests. Live Hermes gateway smoke testing remains.
